nasb.text: These are the territories which Moses apportioned for an inheritance in the plains of Moab, beyond the Jordan at Jericho to the east.

esv.text: These are the inheritances that Moses distributed in the plains of Moab, beyond the Jordan east of Jericho.

cnv.text: 以上這些地方是摩西在約旦河東，耶利哥對面的摩押平原所分配的產業。

ccb.text: 以上是摩西在耶利哥对面约旦河东的摩押平原分给以色列人的产业。
